---
title: "Halter Ranch Conservation Scholars (HARCS) — Cal Poly"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: harcs_head.html
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/glightbox/dist/css/glightbox.min.css">

<div class="harcs-header">
<img src="HARCS_images/harcs_logo.png" alt="Halter Ranch Conservation Scholars logo" class="harcs-logo">
<div class="harcs-intro">

The Halter Ranch Conservation Scholars (HARCS) program provides hands-on learning opportunities and financial support for Cal Poly undergraduates pursuing careers in conservation. The program combines a scholarship, a 10-week spring seminar, and a paid summer internship at a partner conservation organization — giving students a continuous *learn-then-apply* pathway from the classroom to an active conservation project.

</div>
</div>
\
\

### Who the program is for

HARCS is designed for Cal Poly undergraduates with a genuine interest in applied conservation, regardless of major. Successful scholars typically:

- Are curious about California's flora, fauna, and working landscapes.
- Are comfortable spending full days outdoors in variable terrain and weather.
- Are motivated to design, carry out, and communicate an independent project.

No prior research experience is required. Scholars come from biology, environmental management, animal science, agricultural science, and other related programs.
\
\

### What scholars do

**Spring seminar.** Weekly in-classroom meetings paired with field experiences at reserves and natural areas across San Luis Obispo County. The course culminates in a weekend field trip to a preserve and in final presentations of each scholar's independent project proposal.

**Summer internship.** After the seminar, each scholar transitions to a paid summer internship at a partner conservation organization. The internship is where the scholar's spring proposal becomes a real project: collecting data, contributing to ongoing monitoring, building maps, and producing deliverables the host organization can use.
\
\

### Tallies from the field

```{=html}
<div class="harcs-stats">
  <div class="harcs-stat">
    <div class="harcs-stat-number">13700</div>
    <div class="harcs-stat-label">Camera trap photos</div>
  </div>
  <div class="harcs-stat">
    <div class="harcs-stat-number">164</div>
    <div class="harcs-stat-label">Species observed</div>
  </div>
  <div class="harcs-stat">
    <div class="harcs-stat-number">314</div>
    <div class="harcs-stat-label">iNaturalist observations</div>
  </div>
  <div class="harcs-stat">
    <div class="harcs-stat-number">65</div>
    <div class="harcs-stat-label">Pages of field notes</div>
  </div>
</div>
<p class="harcs-stats-note"> 2026 Cohort to date.</p>
```
\


### Partner organizations

- [Rana Creek Preserve](https://wildlandsconservancy.org/ranacreek) — The Wildlands Conservancy
- [Bearpaw Preserve](https://wildlandsconservancy.org/preserves/bearpaw) — The Wildlands Conservancy
- [SLO Land Conservancy](https://lcslo.org/)
- [Bigfoot Trail Alliance](https://www.bigfoottrail.org/)
- [Scott River Watershed Council (SRWC)](http://scottriver.org/)
\
\

### Current projects

::: {.harcs-project}
#### Rangeland assessments and Beaver Dam Analog site selection at Rana Creek Preserve

*Interns: Finn Torres & Natalie Donnelson — Rana Creek Preserve, The Wildlands Conservancy*

Finn and Natalie are working on two major projects at the Rana Creek Preserve, guided by the preserve manager, Kat Hardisty-Cranstone. The first is a rangeland monitoring program that the interns helped to develop and are implementing for the first time this year. The preserve is actively grazed, and the cows were fitted with collars this year to allow for virtual fencing. This allows for greater adaptability to control where and at what intensity the cows are grazing. As this project continues, the monitoring data can be used to determine what grazing strategies are having a positive impact on rangeland health.

The second major project is surveying the riparian areas on the preserve to identify potential areas for installing beaver dam analogs (BDA's) and eventual beaver introductions. BDA's are human made structures that mimic beaver dams and help restore creeks and streams to a healthy condition. By identifying suitable areas and installing BDA's, the preserve will raise groundwater levels, decrease erosion, and create habitat for fish, amphibians, riparian vegetation and eventually, beavers.
:::

::: {.harcs-project}
#### Beaver Dam Analog installation and monitoring with SRWC

*Intern: Landon Miller — Scott River Watershed Council*

Landon is working with the Scott River Watershed Council on installing BDA's in the Scott River Watershed, located in the Klamath Mountains of Northern California. The council is focusing on installing BDAs in degraded mountain meadows, where the structures will help reduce channel incision and raise the groundwater level, restoring the natural hydrology that makes these meadows home to a huge diversity of native grasses and wildflowers. Landon has placed wildlife cameras at BDA sites, to record wildlife use of the sites before and after the structures are installed. This will help inform how the creation of ponds affects even animals that don't directly live in them.
:::

::: {.harcs-project}
#### Cascades Frogs habitat assessment with the SRWC and Cal Fish and Wildlife

*Intern: Rowan Campbell — Scott River Watershed Council & CDFW*

Rowan is working with SRWC and CDFW to better understand how the Cascades Frog (a candidate species for endangered status) uses mountain meadows. In addition to surveying meadows to assess their ecological health with SRWC, he is collaborating with CDFW to survey meadows for Cascades Frogs. Healthy meadows with intact hydrology are more likely to host shallow ponds that are breeding habitat for Cascades Frogs. Rowan's work may eventually link restoring the hydrology of meadows using tools like BDAs to improved breeding habitat for Cascades Frogs.
:::

::: {.harcs-project}
#### Post-fire vegetation management at Bear Paw Preserve

*Interns: Rylyn Jaggar & Rylie Helberg — Bear Paw Preserve, The Wildlands Conservancy*

Rylyn and Rylie at Bear Paw Preserve are focused on understanding how vegetation management on the preserve impacts wildlife. Bear Paw Preserve was completely burned at high severity in the 2020 El Dorado Fire. The preserve, previously composed of mature Black Oak and Big Cone Douglas Fir woodland, is now dominated by vigorously resprouting shrub species such as Ceanothus and Choke Cherry. Under natural fire regimes, forests would have burned with mixed severity and trees would have only been fully killed in some areas, creating a patchwork of trees and shrubs. While part of the natural regeneration process, when they are too widespread, shrubs can prevent tree seedlings from re-establishing and increase the probability that an area will burn again. The staff at Bear Paw have been able to remove the shrubs in some areas, in an attempt to reduce fire hazard and restore oak trees to the area. Rylyn and Rylie are monitoring a network of wildlife cameras spread throughout the treated and untreated areas, conducting plant surveys, recording bird activity, and measuring soil chemistry, all to assess the impacts and benefits of the vegetation management on the preserve.
:::

::: {.harcs-project}
#### Land Conservation in San Luis Obispo County

*Intern: Santiago Olvera — Land Conservancy of San Luis Obispo County*

Santiago is working locally with the Land Conservancy of San Luis Obispo County. He is focused on learning about the process of establishing conservation easements, through helping with baseline documentation of a new easement. He is also shadowing teams working on ecosystem restoration, ecological monitoring, and community outreach.
:::
\


### How to apply

Applications open each fall for the following spring cohort. A link to apply will be provided when the application period opens, and interested students are encouraged to reach out directly.

Contact: Reed Kenny — [rekenny@calpoly.edu](mailto:rekenny@calpoly.edu)
\
\

### Photo gallery

<p class="harcs-gallery-hint">Click any photo to view full size — use the arrow keys or swipe to step through.</p>

```{=html}
<div class="harcs-gallery">
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1404.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1404.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring BDAs at Walters Creek"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1405.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1405.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring BDAs at Walters Creek"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1406.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1406.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring BDAs at Walters Creek"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1408.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1408.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring BDAs at Walters Creek"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1414.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1414.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring BDAs at Walters Creek"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1431.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1431.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring Black Lake Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1433.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1433.jpeg" alt="Monardella undulata"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1434.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1434.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring Black Lake Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1445.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1445.jpeg" alt="HARCS mapping serpentine plants at Cal Poly"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1462.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1462.jpeg" alt="HARCS learning bird ID at Sweet Springs preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1464.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1464.jpeg" alt="HARCS learning bird ID at Sweet Springs preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/field_clip.mp4" class="glightbox harcs-video" data-gallery="harcs" data-type="video"><img src="HARCS_images/field_clip_poster.jpg" alt="HARCS camera trap video"><span class="harcs-play"></span></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1470.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1470.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring Cerra Alto Ranch"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1471.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1471.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring Cerra Alto Ranch"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1472.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1472.jpeg" alt="HARCS touring Cerra Alto Ranch"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1485.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1485.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1488.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1488.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1490.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1490.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1497.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1497.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_0919.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_0919.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_0929.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_0929.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_0930.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_0930.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_0931.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_0931.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_01.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_01.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_02.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_02.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_03.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_03.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_04.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_04.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_05.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_05.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_06.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_06.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_07.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_07.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_08.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_08.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/campbell_09.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/campbell_09.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Rowan Campbell)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/miller_01.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/miller_01.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field (photo by Landon Miller)"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/miller_clip.mp4" class="glightbox harcs-video" data-gallery="harcs" data-type="video"><img src="HARCS_images/miller_clip_poster.jpg" alt="HARCS field video (by Landon Miller)"><span class="harcs-play"></span></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_3735.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_3735.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_3999.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_3999.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_6954.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_6954.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/PXL_20260623_182525803.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/PXL_20260623_182525803.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/PXL_20260624_180603799.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/PXL_20260624_180603799.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/PXL_20260625_010714536.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/PXL_20260625_010714536.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/PXL_20260626_181347391.MP.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/PXL_20260626_181347391.MP.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/1782740265.994236.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/1782740265.994236.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/1782740266.110429.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/1782740266.110429.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/1782740268.7424269.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/1782740268.7424269.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/1782740269.888435.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/1782740269.888435.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_finn_01.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_finn_01.jpeg" alt="Finn Torres in the field at Rana Creek Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_finn_02.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_finn_02.jpeg" alt="Finn Torres in the field at Rana Creek Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_finn_03.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_finn_03.jpeg" alt="Finn Torres in the field at Rana Creek Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_nat_01.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_nat_01.jpeg" alt="Natalie Donnelson in the field at Rana Creek Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_nat_02.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_nat_02.jpeg" alt="Natalie Donnelson in the field at Rana Creek Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_landon_01.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_landon_01.jpeg" alt="Landon Miller in the field with SRWC"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_landon_02.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_landon_02.jpeg" alt="Landon Miller in the field with SRWC"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_landon_03.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_landon_03.jpeg" alt="Landon Miller in the field with SRWC"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/harcs_bio472_01.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/harcs_bio472_01.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/harcs_bio472_02.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/harcs_bio472_02.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/harcs_bio472_03.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/harcs_bio472_03.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/harcs_bio472_04.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/harcs_bio472_04.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_image_02.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_image_02.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_image_03.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_image_03.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_image_04.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_image_04.jpg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_04.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_04.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week4_05.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week4_05.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/pismo_preserve.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/pismo_preserve.jpeg" alt="Pismo Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week3_finn_01.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week3_finn_01.jpeg" alt="Finn Torres during a Week 3 internship check-in"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week3_finn_02.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week3_finn_02.jpeg" alt="Finn Torres during a Week 3 internship check-in"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week3_finn_03.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week3_finn_03.jpeg" alt="Finn Torres during a Week 3 internship check-in"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week3_finn_04.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week3_finn_04.jpeg" alt="Finn Torres during a Week 3 internship check-in"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week3_landon_01.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week3_landon_01.jpeg" alt="Landon Miller during a Week 3 internship check-in"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week3_landon_02.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week3_landon_02.jpeg" alt="Landon Miller during a Week 3 internship check-in"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week3_landon_03.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week3_landon_03.jpeg" alt="Landon Miller during a Week 3 internship check-in"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/week3_landon_04.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/week3_landon_04.jpeg" alt="Landon Miller during a Week 3 internship check-in"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/black_lake_weeding.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/black_lake_weeding.jpeg" alt="HARCS weeding at Black Lake Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/grounding_stone.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/grounding_stone.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/rylyn.jpg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/rylyn.jpg" alt="Rylyn Jaggar in the field at Bear Paw Preserve"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1566.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1566.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1568.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1568.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1569.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1569.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1571.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1571.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1574.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1574.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1575.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1575.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1576.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1576.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1580.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1580.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1581.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1581.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1608.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1608.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1612.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1612.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1614.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1614.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1615.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1615.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1616.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1616.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1617.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1617.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
<a href="HARCS_images/IMG_1618.jpeg" class="glightbox" data-gallery="harcs"><img src="HARCS_images/IMG_1618.jpeg" alt="HARCS in the field"></a>
</div>
```

---

*The Halter Ranch Conservation Scholars program is supported by Halter Ranch and partner conservation organizations across California.*

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/glightbox/dist/js/glightbox.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    GLightbox({ selector: '.glightbox', loop: true });
  });
</script>
